'''âb-y-z''' ('''kabayaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:impave|impave]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-y-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:impave|impave]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-y-z
|-
! Lemma
| kabayaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibayaz|thibayaz]] || [[word:jibayaz|jibayaz]] || [[word:shibayaz|shibayaz]] || [[word:kibayaz|kibayaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubayaz|thuthubayaz]] || [[word:jujubayaz|jujubayaz]] || [[word:shushubayaz|shushubayaz]] || [[word:kukubayaz|kukubayaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubayaz|thubayaz]] || [[word:jubayaz|jubayaz]] || [[word:shubayaz|shubayaz]] || [[word:kubayaz|kubayaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubayaz|thubayaz]] || [[word:jubayaz|jubayaz]] || [[word:shubayaz|shubayaz]] || [[word:kubayaz|kubayaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebayaz|thebayaz]] || [[word:jebayaz|jebayaz]] || [[word:shebayaz|shebayaz]] || [[word:kebayaz|kebayaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobayaz|thothobayaz]] || [[word:jojobayaz|jojobayaz]] || [[word:shoshobayaz|shoshobayaz]] || [[word:kokobayaz|kokobayaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobayaz|thobayaz]] || [[word:jobayaz|jobayaz]] || [[word:shobayaz|shobayaz]] || [[word:kobayaz|kobayaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobayaz|thobayaz]] || [[word:jobayaz|jobayaz]] || [[word:shobayaz|shobayaz]] || [[word:kobayaz|kobayaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbayaz|thĂŠbayaz]] || [[word:jĂŠbayaz|jĂŠbayaz]] || [[word:shĂŠbayaz|shĂŠbayaz]] || [[word:kĂŠbayaz|kĂŠbayaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabayaz|thathabayaz]] || [[word:jajabayaz|jajabayaz]] || [[word:shashabayaz|shashabayaz]] || [[word:kakabayaz|kakabayaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabayaz|thabayaz]] || [[word:jabayaz|jabayaz]] || [[word:shabayaz|shabayaz]] || [[word:kabayaz|kabayaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabayaz|thabayaz]] || [[word:jabayaz|jabayaz]] || [[word:shabayaz|shabayaz]] || [[word:kabayaz|kabayaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabayaz|shabayaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabayaz|goshabayaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabayaz|gokishabayaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabayaznĂŒ|shabayaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabayaznknĂŒ|goshabayaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabayaznĂŒ|gokishabayaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabayazshĂ«|shabayazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabayaznkshĂ«|goshabayaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabayazshĂ«|gokishabayazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabayazro|shabayazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabayaznkro|goshabayaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabayazro|gokishabayazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabayazmu|shabayazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabayaznkmu|goshabayaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabayazmu|gokishabayazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabayazsher|shabayazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabayaznksher|goshabayaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabayazsher|gokishabayazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabayazng|shabayazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabayaznkng|goshabayaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabayazng|gokishabayazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabayazya|shabayazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabayaznkya|goshabayaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabayazya|gokishabayazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabayazyam|shabayazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabayaznkyam|goshabayaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabayazyam|gokishabayazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabayaznĂŒshĂ«|shabayaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabayaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshabayaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabayaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishabayaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabayaznĂŒro|shabayaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabayaznknĂŒro|goshabayaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabayaznĂŒro|gokishabayaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabayaznĂŒmu|shabayaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabayaznknĂŒmu|goshabayaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabayaznĂŒmu|gokishabayaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabayazshĂ«nĂŒ|shabayazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabayaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshabayaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabayazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishabayazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabayazshĂ«ro|shabayazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabayaznkshĂ«ro|goshabayaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabayazshĂ«ro|gokishabayazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabayazshĂ«mu|shabayazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabayaznkshĂ«mu|goshabayaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabayazshĂ«mu|gokishabayazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabayazronĂŒ|shabayazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabayaznkronĂŒ|goshabayaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabayazronĂŒ|gokishabayazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabayazroshĂ«|shabayazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabayaznkroshĂ«|goshabayaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabayazroshĂ«|gokishabayazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabayazromu|shabayazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabayaznkromu|goshabayaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabayazromu|gokishabayazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabayazmunĂŒ|shabayazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabayaznkmunĂŒ|goshabayaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabayazmunĂŒ|gokishabayazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabayazmushĂ«|shabayazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabayaznkmushĂ«|goshabayaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabayazmushĂ«|gokishabayazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabayazmuro|shabayazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabayaznkmuro|goshabayaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabayazmuro|gokishabayazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|97f1258}}
